businessName: Furbulous Fur Babies Pet grooming and Boutique
description: We are a mobile grooming and pet service family run business. Our goal is to make owning your pet as easy as possible. As a veterinary tech and groomer, your pet's health is my number one priority. We know your time is valuable so let us go to you.

layoutDescription: Boutique storefront feel: framed hero like a shop window, soft shadow, gallery as masonry; warm or refined palette depending on vertical.
mood: Friendly, caring, trustworthy — pets are family
antiPatterns: No menu section. No restaurant language. Soft or playful but not childish unless posts suggest it.
photoInventory: You will receive 11 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
